---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

## Journal Articles

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-xl-4}
### [Assessing the Effects of Surface-Stabilized Zero-Valent Iron Nanoparticles on Diverse Bacteria Species Using Complementary Statistical Models](https://doi.org/10.3390/jfb16030113)

**Authors:**  Brittany J. Carnathan, Dinny Stevens, Swarna Shikha, Carson Slater, **Nathen Byford**, Rodney X. Sturdivant, Kuzy Zarzosa, W. Evan Braswell and Christie M. Sayes 

*J. Funct. Biomater. 2025, 16(3), 113*

**Abstract:** This study examines antimicrobial effects of surface-stabilized zero-valent iron nanoparticles (FeNPs) with three different coatings on six bacterial species. Using ordinal regression and generalized linear mixed models, we analyzed zone of inhibition data to compare bacterial sensitivity across treatments. Statistical analyses revealed significant differences in responses based on coating type and nanoparticle concentration. The concordance between both statistical approaches increases confidence in our findings that AA-FeNPs and CTAB-FeNPs exhibited superior antibacterial activity, with bacterial sensitivity varying systematically across species. This statistical framework supports the "designer nanoparticle" concept and provides a methodological foundation for future research.

:::{.d-flex .justify-content-between} 
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.3390/jfb16030113){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::
<!--
:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-xl-4}
### [Title of Article 2](https://doi.org/link-to-article)

**Authors:** Your Name, Co-author 3, Co-author 4

*Journal Name, Year, Volume(Issue), Pages*

**Abstract:** Brief summary of your research and findings.

:::{.d-flex .justify-content-between}
[PDF](path/to/pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} [DOI](https://doi.org/link){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} [Code](https://github.com/yourusername/repo){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::
-->
:::

<!--## Conference Proceedings

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12}
### [Title of Conference Paper](https://doi.org/link-to-paper)

**Authors:** Your Name, Co-author 5, Co-author 6

*Conference Name, Location, Year*

**Abstract:** Brief summary of your paper and findings.

:::{.d-flex}
[PDF](path/to/pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary .me-2} 
[Slides](path/to/slides){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary .me-2} 
[Code](https://github.com/yourusername/repo){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

:::

## Preprints

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12}
### [Title of Preprint](https://arxiv.org/abs/xxxx.xxxxx)

**Authors:** Your Name, Co-author 7, Co-author 8

*arXiv:xxxx.xxxxx [category]*

**Abstract:** Brief summary of your preprint and findings.

:::{.d-flex}
[PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/xxxx.xxxxx){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary .me-2} 
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/xxxx.xxxxx){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary .me-2}
[Code](https://github.com/yourusername/repo){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

:::

## Book Chapters

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12}
### Chapter Title

**Authors:** Your Name, Co-author 9

**Book:** *Book Title*

**Editors:** Editor 1, Editor 2

**Publisher:** Publisher Name, Year, Pages

**Abstract:** Brief summary of your chapter.

:::{.d-flex}
[Publisher Link](https://publisher.com/book){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

:::

## Technical Reports

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12}
### Title of Report

**Authors:** Your Name, Co-author 10

*Institution/Organization, Year, Report Number*

**Abstract:** Brief summary of your report.

:::{.d-flex}
[PDF](path/to/pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary .me-2}
[Link](https://organization.org/report){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

:::-->

::: {.callout-note}
## Citation Information
If you use any of the materials presented on this page, please cite the corresponding publication.
:::
